title: [PrettifyVerilog] Crash by comparing different width of APInts
body:
```mlir
hw.module @crash(%a: i1, %clock: i1, %in1: !hw.array<2xi1>) -> (b: !hw.array<5xi1>) {
  %c0_i3 = hw.constant 0 : i3
  %false = hw.constant false
  %0 = hw.array_get %in1[%false] : !hw.array<2xi1>, i1
  %r = sv.reg  : !hw.inout<array<5xi1>>
  %1 = sv.array_index_inout %r[%c0_i3] : !hw.inout<array<5xi1>>, i3
  %2 = sv.read_inout %r : !hw.inout<array<5xi1>>
  sv.always posedge %clock {
    sv.passign %1, %0 : i1
  }
  hw.output %2 : !hw.array<5xi1>
}
```
```
firtool: /home/uenoku/dev/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/APInt.h:1007: bool llvm::APInt::operator==(const llvm::APInt &) const: Assertion `BitWidth == RHS.BitWidth && "Comparison requires equal bit widths"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace.
```
